title: Schilleria riparia
intro: Schilleria riparia, also known as the riparian Schilleria, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Schilleria riparia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders.
